purpose: Decomposes hyperscaler ROIC by capital vintage to demonstrate the arithmetic certainty of blended ROIC convergence toward WACC regardless of assumptions
components: Blended ROIC weighted by capital stock proportions
current_assessment: At zero capex growth blended ROIC declines from ~22-25% to ~14-17% by 2028. At 30-50% growth blended reaches ~12-15% approaching 9-11% WACC. Blending arithmetic is mechanical and irrefutable.
limitations: 2022-2024 vintage ROIC has plus/minus 5pp uncertainty due to revenue attribution opacity
Revenue bundling creates irreducible denominator uncertainty
Assumes current capital stock retains productivity; accelerated obsolescence would worsen
Does not account for potential ROIC improvement from learning curve effects
